title: user:notification stream not filtered to notifications only
description: streaming.rs resolve_channel maps both 'user' and 'user:notification' to the same channel key 'user:{id}'. The Mastodon streaming API contract is that 'user:notification' only receives notification events, not status updates. Clients (e.g. Tusky, Ivory) subscribing to 'user:notification' will receive statuses they didn't ask for, causing duplicate entries in notification-only views.
